texto: Bipolar illness, manic depression, manic-depressive illness, manic-depressive psychosis. That’s a nice way of saying you will feel so high that no street drug can compete and you will feel so low that you wish you had been hit by a Mack truck instead.
explicacao: Citação de Christine F. Anderson sobre temas ligados a saude mental. “Bipolar illness, manic depression, manic-depressive illness, manic-depressive psychosis. That’s a…” articula saude-mental, bipolar-disorder, mental-illness em registro de saude mental, com relevância para contextos como mental-illness.
